name: 1'8"x2'10" Rectangle Floral Rug - Room Essentials™
description:
Complete your decor with the pastel charm of this Rectangle Floral Rug from Room Essentials™. This accent rug showcases a refreshing floral pattern in pastel colors on a white background, adding a pop of color to your indoor space. Crafted with a polyurethane-rubber blend and rubber backing, it features a flat pile height for versatile placement throughout your home. Use it in your entryway to create a welcoming vibe or to accent spaces like a reading nook or small desk.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
